values: =TEXT(TODAY(),"m/d/yyyy") & " Intro Call Passed. Atlanta area with flexibility around 20 miles. Formal childcare experience in daycare, substitute teaching, and education. Available part-time during school year with potential full-time in summer."

Verrie has 5+ years of daycare experience plus 6-8 years of substitute teaching and school bus driving—massively overqualified. His conflict resolution answer shows maturity and structure. Atlanta location is solid. Strong approve.

 And I listen to the information, I gather the facts and we try to come to a resolution as to what's the correct way to handle the situation?
